commit_message:
Improve right-to-left streaming operator support. Improve right-to-left streaming operator support. Fixes streaming operator in black-parrot and opentitan.
Some extra refactoring and fixing as a bonus. Commit-by-commit review is recommended.

UHDM-integration-tests: https://github.com/chipsalliance/UHDM-integration-tests/pull/727
